---
title: "Miss Bennett"
---

## Miss Bennett

**Dates:** (fl.28 Oct 1844)

### Description

She was possibly a member of the Bennett family of Sparkford, cousins of the Moberlys, evidently living near Otterbourne.

The Miss Bennett, known to Louisa Catherine Palmer, who had eye trouble in 1864, might be the same person, or not.

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 26th [1864]
- Letter from Oct 28th 1844

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
